text: I feel a sense of curiosity lingering in me as I notice the contrast between spaces: from the sterile, slightly disorienting corridor to the vibrant, intellectual energy of the exhibit. The presence of another person engaged in contemplation reminds me how shared environments can foster collective inquiry, and I find myself eager to explore the ideas around me. There is a subtle excitement, mingled with awareness of my place as both observer and participant in the unfolding dialogue of innovation and knowledge.
